subject: Painting that holds your value engineering
body:
Hi Justin,

buildvalue.ca tells me Pretium thinks about value engineering carefully. Painting subs are usually where that thinking gets undone — bloated bids, slow turnarounds, surface damage on freshly finished work.

Ashrah Painting runs different. Lumi (our AI estimating agent) returns 95%-detailed bids in 24 hours, at least 13% lower than human-estimated subs. Lumia keeps your PM informed during execution. Pro cleaning at handoff with no surface damage.

Worth 15 minutes for a quick intro?
cta: Worth 15 minutes for a quick intro?
signals_used: Justin Bova = Owner of Pretium Projects. Domain buildvalue.ca = VE positioning.
